top_signals.title: Trump Says No Rush for Iran Deal, US Blockade Stays
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Sunday he had told his representatives not to rush into any deal with Iran, as his administration played down hopes of an imminent breakthrough in the three-month-old war that had been raised a day earlier.The U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese Ship Leaves Standoff Near Taiwan-Controlled Islands
top_signals.summary: A Chinese coast guard ship left waters near Taiwan's strategically located Pratas Islands at the top of the South China Sea on Sunday following a tense standoff and verbal sparring between the coast guards, Taiwan's Coast Guard said.China claims democratically governed Taiwan as its own territory…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
